title: The overthrowing of Muhammad b. Ja'far 's rule by the 'Abbasid forces, and his renunciation of power
description: The overthrowing of Muhammad b. Ja'far 's rule by the 'Abbasid forces, and his renunciation of power. Recorded under the year 198 AH (814–815 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
